div1.entryFree: Bodkin, a sharp instrument to make holes by piercing: what is this? a cittern-head; the head of a b. LLL V, 2, 615. betwixt the firmament and it you cannot thrust a --'s point, Wint. III, 3, 87. when he himself might his quietus make with a bare b. Hml. III, 1, 76. In Hml. II, 2, 554 Qq God's bodkin, Ff. bodykins.
